synopsis:
**Death by Droid!**

With his Force powers still out of control, Darth Vader's more powerful and vulnerable than ever before. Which makes this the perfect time for him to be betrayed by one of his most trusted associates (and astoundingly, it's not Aphra or Ochi)!

Featuring the return of Triple-Zero and Bee Tee, and the deadliest team up of droids Vader has ever faced!
title: Darth Vader (2020) #36
